station_address: S-86, PLOT NO, 3, Maruti Mandir Rd, Subhash Nagar, Bhandup West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400078
text: This is certainly a good CNG petrol pump, every time I have fueled up here, my car have given good average compare to other petrol pumps in the vicinity. Even they have online CNG which is available all time and have more than 5-6 nozzles which makes it very comfortable as far as long queue’s are concerned

station_address: S-86, PLOT NO, 3, Maruti Mandir Rd, Subhash Nagar, Bhandup West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400078
text:
Great to see that this pump has introduced one more new CNG station so that the crowd can be manage.
now they have 3 CNG station 2 for common people and one for auto.
recently i visited it was around 8pm  no crowd and very fast service.
staff are also very humble here. I was not having 2 rs change he told me to go with a smile and i promise i will return next time.
thanks

station_address: S-86, PLOT NO, 3, Maruti Mandir Rd, Subhash Nagar, Bhandup West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400078
text: Petroleum, often referred to as crude oil, is a naturally occurring, flammable liquid found beneath the Earth's surface. It is composed of hydrocarbons and other organic compounds, and it is one of the primary sources of energy worldwide. Petroleum is refined to produce various fuels such as gasoline, diesel, and jet fuel, as well as numerous other products including plastics, lubricants, and asphalt. It plays a crucial role in powering vehicles, heating homes, and fueling industries, making it one of the most valuable natural resources globally.
